meta.title: Alan Faerverguer — Software Engineer
meta.description: Full-stack software developer with 10+ years shipping production-grade applications end-to-end. TypeScript, .NET, NestJS, React, Angular, Next.js.

hero.name: Alan Faerverguer
hero.subtitle: Full-stack software developer. 10+ years shipping production end-to-end.
hero.lead: I work in TypeScript/JavaScript (NestJS, React, Next.js, Angular) and .NET. Experience architecting multi-tenant SaaS platforms, marketplaces, and AI-integrated applications. Focus on clean architecture, scalable APIs, and real-world delivery.

items.title: MVP marketplace platform from scratch
items.subtitle: Whynda · Remote
items.problem: Build a marketplace platform with multi-method authentication and payments from scratch (0→1).
items.solution: RESTful API with 30+ controllers covering authentication, orders, payments, shipments, catalog, and messaging. Multi-method auth: JWT (15-min access / 7-day refresh), Google OAuth, Apple OAuth, phone OTP via Brevo. Integrated Stripe + Plaid (card tokenization and bank transfers). Real-time messaging with Socket.io. Cloud storage on AWS S3 and Cloudflare R2. Redis for sessions and caching. Serilog for structured logging. Docker.

items.title: Theater ticket reservation system
items.subtitle: Freelance · Danzas Reina Reech
items.problem: Digitalize theater reservations with tiered pricing and WhatsApp confirmation.
items.solution: Full-stack booking platform with dynamic mobile-first seat map, QR ticket generation via Puppeteer, WhatsApp booking confirmations, XLSX export, and tier-based pricing.

items.title: End-to-end dance academy management
items.subtitle: Freelance · Danzas Reina Reech
items.problem: Run a dance academy — enrollment, attendance, tuition, grading, and teacher payroll — in one system.
items.solution: Comprehensive management platform with enrollment pipeline and student progression, academic structure with prerequisite chains, attendance tracking, installment payments, exam grading, teacher payroll reporting, and granular RBAC.

items.title: AI-powered sales SaaS platform
items.subtitle: Freelance
items.problem: Conversational e-commerce over WhatsApp with multi-tenant scale.
items.solution: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with NestJS 11 + Fastify and Supabase. Conversational AI agent built with Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (ADK) for WhatsApp-based e-commerce. Async job processing with BullMQ/Redis. Integrations with MercadoPago, Tiendanube, and WhatsApp Cloud API.

items.title: mcp-arca-afip
items.subtitle: MIT · github.com/faeralan/mcp-arca-afip
items.problem: Querying ARCA/AFIP's 49 web services is slow and noisy — PDF manuals, WSDLs, and error codes scattered across pages.
items.solution: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server with a full RAG pipeline: scraping, HTML/PDF/WSDL parsing, recursive chunking, embeddings (multilingual-e5-small via Hugging Face Transformers), and SQLite + sqlite-vec as the vector store. Dockerized ingestion; monthly index rebuild via GitHub Actions.

items.name: End-to-end product
items.description: From spec to production release. Backend, frontend, infrastructure, and deploy.

items.name: Backend & APIs
items.description: REST and SOAP APIs, microservices, async jobs, and external integrations.

items.name: SaaS architecture
items.description: Multi-tenant systems, authentication, billing, and observability.

items.name: AI integration
items.description: Conversational agents and LLM workflows (Google Gemini ADK).

items.name: AI process automation
items.description: Orchestrating business processes with LLMs and agents: end-to-end pipelines, data ingestion and enrichment, event-driven tasks.

items.name: Legacy modernization
items.description: Refactors, technology migrations, and continuous improvement.

items.name: Technical consulting
items.description: Code review, audits, and team process improvement.
MVP marketplace platform 0→1 on ASP.NET 8 + Angular 18. REST API with 30+ controllers, multi-method auth, Stripe, Plaid, Socket.io, AWS S3, Cloudflare R2.
Theater ticket reservation system (Danzas Reina Reech). AI-powered sales SaaS platform over WhatsApp (in development).
Enterprise health applications for the maritime industry (global cruise and cargo operators). Modules in Angular, PHP, Node.js. Continuous improvement and new delivery workflows.
Admin system for pharmaceutical quality control. Contributed to technology migrations of the core development stack.
Insurance e-commerce in Angular, Node.js, PHP. Java batch notification system. SQL Server triggers and stored procedures.
